Your Personal Trading Assistant

Risk management systems stop your trades—but not your behavior. They prevent losses, but they don’t explain what caused them. NEXAI makes your decisions visible in real time.

Without accountability, discipline breaks

Overtrading after losses

Emotional decision-making

Ignoring predefined rules

Increasing position size impulsively

A system that reflects your behavior in real time

Tracks

Tracks your predefined rules

Monitors

Monitors your actions live with a voice assistant that is there FOR YOU only

Detects

Detects deviations instantly

Responds

Responds with awareness-based feedback

Real-Time Accountability

Rule violation alerts

Voice assistant feedback

Session lock

What NEX AI is NOT

Not a trading bot

Not a signal provider

Not financial advice

NEXAI does not tell you what to trade. It ensures you follow your own rules and learn from your mistakes

Your Data is Safe with Us

Our team has 7 active and profitable traders with 30+ years of experience in several markets. We are happy to be partnered with some of the biggest prop firms that will make this journey unforgettable!

7

active and
profitable traders

30+

years of
experience

Every action is tracked

Rule adherence tracking

Behaviour monitoring

Trade activity overview

Violation history

Discipline is enforced — not suggested

Real-time alerts

Instant alerts when rules are broken

Voice feedback

Real-time voice feedback on your actions

Session lockouts

Session lockouts when limits are exceeded

Experience real trading accountability

Your rules define the structure, but your behavior defines the outcome. NEXAI makes every decision visible so you can stay consistent and in control.
